toolPurpose: Search for movies by keyword with optional language, year, and region filters. Returns paginated results with basic movie metadata including title, release date, and poster imagery.

query.description: Search query for movie title or keyword (e.g., 'The Matrix', 'action adventure', 'sci-fi')

region.description: ISO 3166-1 region code to filter results by release region (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'JP')

toolPurpose: Search for TV shows by keyword with optional language, first air date year, and pagination support. Returns basic TV show metadata including title, first air date, and poster imagery.

query.description: Search query for TV show title or keyword (e.g., 'Breaking Bad', 'comedy series', 'drama')

first_air_date_year.description: Filter results by first air date year (e.g., 2023)

toolPurpose: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific movie by TMDB movie ID. Returns full metadata including plot, runtime, genres, ratings, cast, crew, videos, and images when requested.

movie_id.description: TMDB movie ID (e.g., 550 for Fight Club)

append_to_response.description: Comma-separated list of additional data to append (e.g., 'credits,videos,images,reviews,recommendations')

toolPurpose: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific TV series by TMDB series ID. Returns full metadata including plot, episode information, genres, ratings, cast, crew, videos, and images when requested.

series_id.description: TMDB TV series ID (e.g., 1399 for Breaking Bad)

append_to_response.description: Comma-separated list of additional data to append (e.g., 'credits,videos,images,reviews,recommendations')

toolPurpose: Retrieve trending movies, TV shows, or person entries across specified time windows. Returns paginated list of currently trending entertainment content with time-window filtering (day/week).

media_type.description: Type of trending content to retrieve

toolPurpose: Retrieve currently popular movies from TMDB. Returns paginated list of movies sorted by popularity with optional language and regional filtering.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 region code to filter results by popularity region (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'JP')
